mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tnt_outbox ( aggregate_type, aggregate_id, event_type, payload, tenant_id, occurred_at, status, retry_count, trace_id ) VALUES ( #{aggregateType}, #{aggregateId}, #{eventType}, CAST(#{payload} AS jsonb), #{tenantId}, COALESCE(#{occurredAt}, now()), #{status,typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{retryCount}, #{traceId} )
mapper.select: WITH picked AS ( SELECT id FROM tnt_outbox WHERE status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY occurred_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED ) UPDATE tnt_outbox o SET status = 'PROCESSING' FROM picked WHERE o.id = picked.id RETURNING o.id, o.aggregate_type, o.aggregate_id, o.event_type, o.payload::text AS payload, o.tenant_id, o.occurred_at, o.processed_at, o.retry_count, o.status, o.last_error, o.trace_id
mapper.update: UPDATE tnt_outbox SET status = 'COMPLETED', processed_at = now(), last_error = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
